name: Chicken Supreme
recipeIngredient: 6 oz long grain and wild rice - cooked
1 can cream of celery soup or
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together.
2. Place mixture in a 3-quart dish.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 to 30 minutes, uncovered.
4. May be frozen before cooking. Remove from freezer directly to oven; add about 10 minutes of cooking time.
5. Individual servings can be frozen and reheated in microwave.
Note: The recipe uses canned soup and mayonnaise, which are not typically considered healthy. However, light mayo and low-fat soups work well. French-cut green beans can be substituted with any cut of green bean.
